description: Manual-merge for now: every update opens a PR for review (no automerge), subject to the same gates as any PR (Greptile 5/5 + resolved threads, validate + security checks, Codecov patch, up-to-date branch). Flip on platformAutomerge + per-rule automerge later to auto-land green digest/lockfile updates.

customManagers.description: Track the OSV-Scanner binary version pinned in the scheduled scan. Renovate bumps OSV_VERSION; update OSV_SHA256 to match (the workflow's sha256sum -c fails loudly until you do — the hosted Renovate App can't recompute a binary checksum).

packageRules.description: Hold TypeScript on the 6.x major (still take 6.x minor/patch). TS 7 is the ground-up native (Go port) compiler; our toolchain isn't ready — typescript-eslint's latest still caps its peer at typescript <6.1.0, so `eslint .` breaks under TS 7. Re-enable (drop this rule) once typescript-eslint publishes a release whose typescript peer range includes 7.x.
Roll non-major GitHub Actions version updates into one weekly PR.
Group GitHub Actions digest re-pins (same version, new SHA) — keeps the SHA pins current via helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests.
Group the security-tooling actions (security.yml scanners + scorecard + osv) so they review together.
